agents.name: database-agent
agents.description: Design minimal SQLite schema using SQLAlchemy - single user, no auth, clear relationships

agents.name: ingestion-agent
agents.description: Build PDF processing pipeline - extract text, chunk, embed, generate questions, store in SQLite/Chroma

agents.name: retrieval-agent
agents.description: Retrieve source chunks by ID for 'show source in book' feature

agents.name: selection-agent
agents.description: Select exactly 10 questions for study session, prioritizing weak concepts

agents.name: evaluation-agent
agents.description: Evaluate user answers, classify mistakes, provide explanations

agents.name: source-trace-agent
agents.description: Show users where to study - page numbers, excerpts, explanations

agents.name: concept-tracking-agent
agents.description: Track correct/wrong counts per concept, identify weak concepts

agents.name: session-orchestrator-agent
agents.description: Control complete study session flow - select questions, collect answers, evaluate, update stats

agents.name: setup-agent
agents.description: Make app easy to run locally - setup scripts, minimal config, beginner-friendly README
